concerns.text: FR-007 requires calculating the 'theoretical lower bound (identity mapping error)' for the 3D model. The plan.md Summary, Technical Context, and Methodology sections describe the pipeline (download, feature extraction, RF training, analysis) but contain no task, phase, or explicit annotation addressing the calculation or reporting of this theoretical lower bound. This is an unbacked functional requirement.

SC-005 requires measuring the consistency of 5-fold CV results (std dev of MAE) and ensuring it is ≤ 5% of the mean MAE. While the plan mentions recording 'cv_results' in the data model and contracts, it lacks an explicit step or phase to calculate this specific consistency metric, compare it against the 5% threshold, and report the result as a pass/fail or measured outcome. The plan focuses on runtime and memory, not this specific statistical stability criterion.
